Title: The Vanilla Knot Club
Location: Lucifer's Pit (barn, 1st floor)
Description:
We will go through some basic rope and knots skills that will help you and your camp through the next days. Beginner to advanced. No skills needed. BYOR (bring your own rope - if you have one) 
Disclaimer: We will only tie on non-living things. If you want to tie humans/lovers together, this is not the workshop you are looking for.

Title: Taklagsfest
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square I20. On top of Sunny Hill
Description: A tradition unlike any other. Kick off your Borderland adventure by joining us after a hard day of build, quenching your thrist and dusting of that hat. Roof not guaranteed.

Title: Tiny bag check opening hours
Facilitator/ Host camp: tiny bag check hostess / back alley
Location: in the barn by Lucifer's pit
Description: Tiny bag check is open for you to claim what you checked last year. remember your claim check ticket!

Title: Borderland Virgin workshop (11 principles) 🌱
Location: Eastern Slope, X16.
Description: Virgin Borderling or seasoned burner to the playa? Wondering what the principles are? Then come to this light-guided workshop about the 11 principles of The Borderland. Come one, come all and frolick.

Title: Body Music Co-Composition (Amir/Here)
Location: Downtown, grid square K21. Under the church - Ask about Here at the SINagogue
Description: Your body is a wonderful music instrument with a lot of untapped musical potential. We'll hear and learn notes, melodies, beats and sounds made by human bodies. Pretty sure at least some of them will be completely new to you. Depending on the group, we'll hopefully end up jamming and co-composing something unforgettable.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Sun. 19 July (build), Tue. 21 July); shown on: Sun. 19 July

Title: The Piano Assisted Shitshow w. Aleks Delta
Facilitator/ Host camp: The Great Aleks Delta / Blackwater Operations
Location: Swamp, grid square Q18. Look for the glorious American flag flying above The Green Zone. That's Blackwater Operations. Event is in the main tent.
Description: As per tradition, Blackwater Operations & The Green Zone will be hosting the worst shitshow money can't buy to celebrate the end of build. Think cruiseship entertainment... if it had been abandoned behind an opossum nest at a salvage yard. Drinks may be cold.

Title: Wild Sacred Fire - Opening Ceremony
Location: Swamp, grid square S17. by the Fire Plaza
Description: Together we deliver the rebirth of the WILD SACRED FIRE. Join us in devotion, consecrate the ground, steward the tradition. Here we find ground, that we may lean into intimacy with the unknown. Let Her joy fan the flames of your savage nobility. Bring your heart as kindling.

Title: Campfire Concert 🔥🎶
Facilitator/ Host camp: Jon G. Lör & Itsi-Bitsi / By the fire in Camp Spaceport
Location: Lowlands, grid square P13. Look for the big pink temple and the Spaceport campfire is right in front of it.
Description:
Chill by the big Spaceport fire while enjoying a concert that will soothe your
soul and raise your consciousness to “Borderland Levels”... Maybe you have
had a long day of building and want to wind down... or maybe you have just
arrived and are looking for the perfect way to start your burn.

Title: Hexemutters Galehus
Facilitator/ Host camp: Miss Information / Acid Aunties & Nasty Uncles
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J22. Look for a grumpy old hag - good luck
Description:
Hexemutters Galehus

Warning: experimental medicine cabinet. 41 remedies — yours to judge, yours to draw. Side effects include self-knowledge, mild existential crisis and uncontrollable honesty.

We are not responsible for what the cards unlock.

Always open. We never sleep. Unless we sleep. Wake us and die
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 7 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: LAZY TREATS HOUR
Location: Anywhere
Description: When you've packed up all of your mojo, your tent feels impossibly far away, and truthfully.. you've got a tiny existential wobble brewing, come find us. Lazy Treats Hour will serve you hot toasties, silliness and giggles, plus a generous serving of camp love. Survival, but make it fabulous.

Title: Hot sauna with icy fruits and popsicles!
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square G21.
Description: We will be serving icy stuff at random times. It’s up to the universe whether you get lucky or not.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 5 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Postnörd
Location: Bison - South, grid square O22. Corner on Sunset Plaza
Description: Send your(other)self a message in form of postcard from Borderland. Capture the fleeting moment and extract it out before it vanishes. Come hangout at Socialen, we offer a relaxed space to settle in a reflect for a moment and write yourself or others about your current state of mind.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Co-created time capsules
Location: The time capsules will be placed in an open space in 4 different neighborhoods for co-creation. Stumble upon them or take your desired future message or trinket and ask another Borderling of they have seen where to forward them to the future.
Vibes: 🐵 Kid-friendly · 😇 Sober · 🌈 Queer-inclusive · 🖤 Sex positive · 💥 Sensory content
Description: Time capsules: portals to the past, filled with memories for future generations. Seal photographs, letters or trinkets — 4 capsules, one per cardinal direction, co-created and sealed by different neighborhoods at the end of this year's Borderland. In 2027 they'll be buried under permanent art, for future archaeologists or extraterrestrials to wonder what strange not-a-cult walked this land.

Title: Handpan Jam
Location: Downtown, grid square M20.
Description: Join us for a loose, relaxed jam in the garden. Bring an instrument or your voice and let’s make some music! We have a few handpans to loan to participants, so if you’ve ever wanted to try one out, this is your chance. We’ve built most of them ourselves, and are very excited to see them in other people’s hands! We also have some shakers and other fun  stuff for anyone who wants to jump in.

Title: People watching
Location: Bison - North, grid square P22. We have a 10m dome
Description: Find a good spot anywhere and just sit back and people-watch while relaxing. It looks like a Borderland movie, doesn’t it?
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Open Mat
Location: Highlands, grid square N11. The Pink Tantric Troll on the big workshop tent
Description:
Start the day on the mat with others through primal play, contact improvisation, Brazilian jiu-jitsu or a combination of the three.
There is no facilitator and no fixed structure, just a shared space to explore, connect and move together. Whoever arrives first kicks things off with a five-minute Tabata.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Doggy Day Care at Camp Slothenhive
Location: Lowlands, grid square Q13. An enclosed area with dog toys and shade.
Description: If you want to leave your pooch for a few hours in a quiet campground to be watched by two volunteers, consider coming here.  It's hoped that people who leave their dogs also take a shift.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Meditation in the dome
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description: A place to meditate together in silence, and keep up your home practice, but in silent community. Do come along, first timers also welcome!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Daily Jungian Dream matrix
Location: Swamp, grid square T18. @Feromonia, look for glamping  bell tent with black chimney
Description: Curious on Jungian philosophy and your unconscious? A dream matrix is a space where we share nightly dreams, in order to open up your unconscious and rediscover nightly dreams you'd forgotten. After the matrix there'll be a short teaching and sharing. See insta @BLdreammatrix
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Thrift happens
Facilitator/ Host camp: Kakan, Sickan and Akselito / Java the hut
Location: Highlands, grid square M09.
Description: Where one playa’s cast-offs become your festival glow-up. Curated rags, questionable choices, and impulsive entertainment included. Come dig through the treasures, leave looking fabulous.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: The Orgone Accumulator building workshop
Location: Bison - South, grid square P24. By the tree house in Bison
Description:
Come and build in our workshop area where we will construct orgone accumulators. We will provide the drawings, tools, material and guidance needed. The accumulators will be built in a proper Reichian way in order to accumulate orgone the most effective way possible.
Once the accumulators are built, we will gather Orgone at Borderland and invite participants to be soaked in it, showered with it, and possibly transformed by it.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Post Build Yoga with Little Bear
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description: Tools down, and gear change with a vinyasa sprinkled with an eclectic mix of Tai Chi, Qi Gong, somatics and post-build week stand up comedy; we don’t take anything too seriously.

Title: Painting Stuff Ultra-Black
Facilitator/ Host camp: Oskar / A Camp has no Name
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O06.
Description: Come and paint stuff with ultra-black paint! You won’t see any internal shadows on anything you paint. Absorbs ca 99% of all light. There will be some stuff you can paint if you don’t have any yourself.

Title: Daily Drop-In with the Conflict Resolution Team
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J20. Outside Clown Police HQ
Description:
Stuck in a conflict? Meet the CRT any day. We don’t take sides or decide for you. We’re here to listen, offer mediation tools, and help find ways to coexist. Stop by to chat, learn, or get support!

Conflicts should be solved between those involved, but if that isn’t possible, you can turn to us!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 7 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Circling/relatefulness/Surrendered Leadership
Facilitator/ Host camp: Depends on the day, see program board by SG / Secret Garden
Location: Downtown, grid square M21. Big white star shaped tent in the Secret Garden
Description:
One never has anything to do with another person without holding something of that person's life in ones hands.

If meditation is an art of being
Circling is an art of being-with

Come explore who you are in the meeting with others and the incredible richness of human connection in all its flavours.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Yoga with Lil'L
Location: Bison - South, grid square O22. Sunset Plaza
Description:
Wake up your body and shake off the dust with a playful vinyasa flow. Together we'll move, breathe, stretch, and energise ourselves for the day ahead. Grounding, uplifting, and open to all levels.

Bring a yoga mat or towel and a water bottle.

Title: Soft Landing Circle
Location: Highlands, grid square N11. At Penta Plaza
Description: First day of a magical week full of experiences. I invite you to slow down, tune into yourself, and softly land in your body and the sweet present moment. Feel what's present, what you're longing for, and meet the magic of Borderland from a centered, curious, and grateful space.

Title: Full Spectrum Meditation
Location: Swamp, grid square Q19.
Description: A special meditation event using 4 types of meditation, in sequential order, to facilitate an experience of awakening. First anapana — calm abiding on the breath. Second vipassana — insight meditation, scanning the body for awareness. Third tantric meditation — moving through the chakras, circulating vital energy. Lastly a pointing-out instruction from the Mahamudra tradition, inviting you to recognize your innermost being: pure consciousness. Welcome!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Spin Wooly Yarn
Facilitator/ Host camp: Domile, Tutte, Matilde / Foyaé Villa Hutlös
Location: Eastern Slope, grid square V17. Look for the wool! Follow the smell!
Description:
Want to try something new but old? Then come and have fun with spinning yarn on a drop spindle, exactly as our ancestors did it! Starts 11 am
**Warnings**
Sensory: raw smell of sheep 
Addictive: chance of adopting a new hobby

Title: Ethiopian coffee ceremony
Location: Swamp, grid square T18. Look for the Ethiopian flag!
Description: Experience an Ethiopian coffee ceremony! You don’t need to be there from the start, come when you can during the ceremony and enjoy a cup!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: ZUMBA at JAM CAMP !
Location: Lowlands, grid square R13. Behind Space Port , red white circus tent, lowlands, easy to find.
Description: Get your sweat on with Jutlandias best Zumba instructor, Fun and good exercise - LETS GOOO !!!

Title: Dolce far niente
Location: Bison - North, grid square P22. Big 10m diameter dome
Description:
Master the magical art of doing nothing! No goals, no to-dos just you, a comfy
spot, and sweet, glorious idleness. Hug a tree, wiggle your toes, daydream
wildly. It’s fun, it’s freeing, it’s fabulously unproductive. Permission to laze:
granted!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: toast for a toast
Location: Lowlands, grid square Q13. next to sweetspot and spaceport
Description: Tell me who, in your eyes, deserves a toast. Is it your mom? The ants by the third tree on the left? Paris Hilton? Because you're thinking gratefully about other beings, you get a fresh, delicious piece of toast from me. :)
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Toothpaste tasting
Location: Eastern Slope, grid square U21.
Description:
Make brushing your teeth a fun and absurd way of getting to know new people and new toothpastes! We take you to a trip around the world's most exquisite toothpastes. 
BYOT (Bring your own toothbrush -and pimp it at our craft booth!-) 
No toothbrush ? Pass by for a shot of mouthwash you stinky hippie ! 
Fun toothpastes ? Bring them all !
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 7 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Melt Into Her: Yin Yoga
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J21. Follow the lesbian flag and the fairy lights to the water, the cluster of tents around the Pond with the bell tent at the heart.
Description: Melt into the soft hours with a slow, juicy yin yoga practice for femmes loving femmes (butches & nb folks included). Long-held poses, deep breath, gentle touch, come home to your body by the water. All levels, all bodies. Daily at 11, bring yourself, leave puddly 🐸
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 8 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: The Jewellery Market
Location: This magical jewellery market will pop up at random times and at random places around the playa. If you’re supposed to, you’ll find it.
Description:
All jewellery: $Free.99
I bring jewellery from all over the world to this magical little pop-up! Come pick the piece(s) that speak to you and leave a kind word for the next person. Walk off with your new jewellery and a mystery note from the person before you.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Sharing Circle
Facilitator/ Host camp: Kalle Grill / Shimmering by the forest edge
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O06. In the Arctic Chill, close to Pamper Plaza, behind the camp "Women who supports women"
Description: Break out of the circle of battling for the ears of others. Brief introduction to sharing and supportive listening, then diving in. One circle or several, depending on numbers.

Title: Pranayama & Meditation 30 min
Location: Bison - South, grid square O22. Sunset Plaza
Description:
A quiet moment to arrive. Through traditional breathwork and meditation practices, we'll slow down, become present, and gently settle into ourselves before stepping into the day.

Open to all. Bring something comfortable to sit or lie on, and let your breath do the rest.

Title: How to say I'm sorry
Location: Highlands, grid square P11.
Description: Remember that time someone hurt you but the way they acknowledged and talked to you afterwards made you feel warm and understood? In this workshop we dive deep into our human psychological needs to find the structure of reparing hurt feelings. Join this workshop to get better at saying "I'm sorry"

Title: House of SIN: Consent to Sin
Location: Bison - North, grid square N19. By the Shameless Plaza
Description: Consent to Sin is a fun, welcoming Consent 101 workshop covering the foundations of consent in sex-positive spaces. Through theory and practical exercises, you'll build confidence in communication, boundaries, negotiation and saying both "yes" and "no" with clarity and respect.

Title: Cosmic Cloud Café
Location: Bison - North, grid square O22. Bison - Next to Sunset Plaza
Description:
Enjoy chai, coffee, and cookies that taste like care, baked with love, served with presence and compassion. 
(There is a good chance that we will also serve coffee, etc outside our listed hours <3)
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 4 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Sufficiency talks
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J21. Event place (at Sunny Hills, behind the Clown Police HQ)
Description: How much is enough? Philosophical conversation for everyone!

Title: Black Lotus Yoga with PV
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description: Black Lotus is a vibrant and fluid vinyasa practice built to balance the two phases of the breath to encourage the vital force, pranam to circulate more openöly through the body.

Title: The Bellybutton Fluff Donation Jar returns
Facilitator/ Host camp: Pernille & Babs / Alice the Malice in Wonderland
Location: Wedge, grid square R20.
Description: Got lint? Put your hairy bellybutton to work and donate that gloriously useless fluff to something even more useless. Stuff it in our Collection Jar and receive a Certificate of Donorship. Enough fluff = possible hamster sweater. Do your part for recycling. Multiple donations accepted.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Dreams Coming True Circle
Location: Highlands, grid square N11. Penta Plaza
Description: A safe and playful space to ask for what you want and receive it, over and over again. An abundance of interactions and dreams coming true. Playful, interactive, juicy, fun, exciting!

Title: Punch a hippie
Location: Find us in the high lands. Look for string lights and lots of them (might not be on since it' day time). Or maybe just look for the guy in bright shorts who wants to fight you (lovingly of cause). There will be a sign saying The Rabbit Hole  (maybe square N12)
Description: Open sparring for the hippie martial artist. Come set the week of with a little punch and a little kick. Let's do some boxing, muay thai or maybe some mma. Hoping that the space is fitting, or we might move to a green spot by the big lake. Bring your own equipment. Onlookers are welcome

Title: Ethiopian food - Injera
Location: Swamp, grid square T18. Look for the Ethiopian flag!
Description: Welcome to enjoy Ethiopias national dish, injera! Vegan options are available 🇪🇹

Title: Boot(y) Camp
Facilitator/ Host camp: BounceBunny and Pleasure P / The End of the Rainbow
Location: Bison - North, grid square N20.
Description:
Bouncebunny b2b Pleasure!
A bootylicious workout/dance boot camp with special effects. Join us to get hot and sweaty! All body types welcome: big butts, small butts, no butts, goofy people, shy people, lazy people. Every kind of expression welcome!
But be open to good vibes only and getting swifty 💖"

Title: Tiny bag check opening hours
Facilitator/ Host camp: tiny bag check hostess / back alley
Location: in the barn by Lucifer's pit
Description: Tiny bag check is open for you to claim what you checked last year. remember your claim check ticket!

Title: 12 step meeting (NA & AA)
Facilitator/ Host camp: Sabrine / Camp All Senses, No Sense
Location: Eastern Slope, grid square W16. Look for the Tipi tent, AA sign and the chalkboard in front of the camp
Description: 12 step meeting (recovery)
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Wed. 22 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Improvisational theatre
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J21. Event place (at Sunny Hills, behind the Clown Police HQ)
Description: Learn and laugh :)

Title: Techno & training in the monkeybar
Location: Highlands, grid square M11. Highlands, Penta plaza (big flag) next to Chilldome
Description:
Do you know the feeling of wanting to give up? Learn how to repress your feelings and keep on going in this highly paced workout where the social stigma of giving up is the main driver for continuing.
(All levels are welcome. It’ll be fun.)

Title: confess!
Location: Downtown, grid square K21. in the dark dungeons of the church
Description:
You have sinned. It's ok. Unburden yourself from this weight and dump it all on an anonymous stranger that will host you. The one place where you, in full confidentiality, can admit your worst, release its grip over you and learn to live free. 

Offer your sins and a white rabbit might appear.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Never lose your cup
Location: Arctic chill, grid square L05.
Description: Tired of losing your cup? In this drop-in workshop you can craft a band to hang your cup from your bag, belt, or neck, so it stays with you anywhere you go. You can personalize it so everyone can see it's yours.

Title: 30s Jazz & Neon Splash
Facilitator/ Host camp: celala & Mr black / Occult Oasis Pool Parties
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square H22. At sunny hills, next to the water and the saunas
Description:
Step through a portal to a reimagined past. We’re clashing the swing of the 1930s with the electricity of the future. Think Gramophone-glitch, brassy melodies, and syncopated beats that make the pool feel like a champagne bath.

Dust off your vintage swimwear, find your most eccentric goggles, and prepare for a high-society splash.

Title: Sensy Floordance
Location: Downtown, grid square M19.
Description: Experience during this workshop the freedom of dancing sensually on the floor. The movements are based on moves out of strip clubs, but you do not dance to seduce, but rather for yourself, to sensitively experience what it is like to dance this way in a safe environment.

Title: Circling/Relatefulness/Surrendered Leadership
Facilitator/ Host camp: Depends on the day, see program board by SG / Secret Garden
Location: Downtown, grid square M21. Big white star shaped tent in the Secret Garden
Description:
One never has anything to do with another person without holding something of that person's life in ones hands.

If meditation is an art of being
Circling is an art of being-with

Come explore who you are in the meeting with others and the incredible richness of human connection in all its flavours.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 5 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July, Sat.); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Cunts Serving Crêpes
Location: Lowlands, grid square R11. Located in Low Lands close to Foxhole Camper Vans
Description: Follow the scent to the Low Lands, just south of Snack Plaza, where crispy delights, surprise twists, and loungey vibes await. We flip with flair, serve with love, and welcome all dusty dreamers. We're just a smell away.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: VOICEWORK
Location: Highlands, grid square M11. Look out for the flag with the big heart on it!
Description:
VOICEWORK 
Playful vocal workshop exploring the connection between bodylanguage, movement & sound. Deep,  seriously fun and a great way to meet me people

Title: Workshop in blacksmithing
Location:
Swamp, grid square S17. next to the Fire Plaza, under a linenroof.
Contact for pre-booking: fanny.henriksson1@gmail.com
Vibes: 🦍 Adults only · 😇 Sober · 🌈 Queer-inclusive · 💥 Sensory content
Description:
Want to make a small ring or an artsy creation? This workshop will be a collaboration of your own imagination and the metal.
I will give a small introduction of blacksmithing, then guide you in the process. 
Iron, copper and brass will be available for you to turn into the art you fancy.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 4 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: Hot-sauce Breathwork
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square K21.
Description: Unleash the mind-bending, nerve-wracking and gut wrenching power of breath, sound and sriracha. Let your ego dissolve into a whirlpool of snot, beats, burps and tears during this guided 45 minute journey. Somatic, traumatic, fantastic. Taster discretion may be advised.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Wed. 22 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: How to make a dreamcatcher
Facilitator/ Host camp: Amy / Shimmering by the forest edge
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O06. In the Arctic Chill, close to Pamper Plaza, behind the camp "Women who supports women"
Description: Need a cozy upgrade for your nighttime vibes? Join Amy’s workshop to weave your very own handmade sleep insurance, no prior skills required! You will be provided with eco-friendly ring materials—hand-picked but feel free to bring your own ring or deco

Title: The Art of Kissing
Location: Arctic chill, grid square P07. Look for the beaver sign and stretch tent
Vibes: 🦍 Adults only · 😇 Sober · 🌈 Queer-inclusive · 🖤 Sex positive
Description:
We explore the wonderful world of kissing while practising saying yes and no! 

We start easy and simple, and progressively discover more tenderness, closeness and spicyness... but you only go as far as you want. 

This is a queer-inclusive event 💋💋

Title: "Also" meditation and sharing
Location: Highlands, grid square N11.
Description: What are you? And what are you ALSO? A light-hearted group excercise to express various facets of your identity, positive and also negative. The workshop involves sharing, movement, and also hugs.

Title: Advanced Cuddle Puddle Dynamics and Etiquette (7.5 hp)
Facilitator/ Host camp: Rasmus (Professor emeritus in Advanced Cuddle Puddle Dynamics and Etiquette at the institute of Advanced Cuddle Puddle Dynamics and Etiquette, Cambridge University) / Chilldome
Location: Highlands, grid square M11. Big dome in the Penta Plaza.
Description: Cuddlepuddles are serious business and should be treated as such. This is a condensed theoretical and practical course in advanced cuddlepuddle building. 7.5 university points, fitting virgins and old-timers. Final exam? Build one of the finest cuddlepuddles ever to have visited this puny earth.

Title: House of SIN: SINema Studio Records Your SINful Videos
Location: Bison - North, grid square N19. By the Shameless Plaza
Description: SINema Studio invites you to create short erotic films from our scripts, or your own deliciously questionable ideas. Come solo or with partners, wear masks if you like, or let fate introduce you to fellow sinners. We film. With your consent, your masterpiece might light up SINema on Thursday!

Title: How To Write A Love Poem
Location: Bison - North, grid square N20. Cross from downtown garden over the wooden bridge by  the wood storage or enter from the Shameless Plaza below Club Sin
Description: Tune into your inner poet and learn how to write a love poem for old and new crushes.

Title: Musical improv
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J21. Event place (at Sunny Hills, behind the Clown Police HQ)
Description: Sing everything you want to say and improvise new lyrics to well-known melodies :) Take part, or just listen!

Title: Pregnant at the Burn
Location: Lowlands, grid square T13. We will gather at our camp Mystic Groove in South-Eastern Lowlands. Depending on the amount of participants, we will find a nice cozy spot. Feel free to bring a blanket (or anything you need to sit comfortably).
Description:
A cozy circle for pregnant burners, new parents and anyone exploring burns and parenthood.

Come share about pregnancy at the burn, burn-FOMO, sobriety, energy, changing bodies, relationships, and a question many of us carry: can we keep burning with children?

Partners, babies and all feelings welcome.

Title: Polegasm
Location: Downtown, grid square M19.
Description:
Polegasm returns in a new form: an open pole jam where you can climb, flow, play, and connect throughout the night. Whether you're a seasoned pole dancer or simply curious, come spin, experiment, and share the energy in a welcoming, low-pressure space at Plutonia.

Want updates or to connect with other pole dancers before the burn? Join our WhatsApp group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/HpT6ByvXTf0FiBPjGi5p3o?mode=gi_t
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Mon. 20 July

Title: The world through my eyes - visual impairment simulator”
Location: Bison - South, grid square O22. Event held at ”Socialen”, Sunset Plaza

Title: LAZY TREATS HOUR
Location: Anywhere
Description: When you've packed up all of your mojo, your tent feels impossibly far away, and truthfully.. you've got a tiny existential wobble brewing, come find us. Lazy Treats Hour will serve you hot toasties, silliness and giggles, plus a generous serving of camp love. Survival, but make it fabulous.

Title: The Wandering Tree
Location: Bison - North, grid square O20. Shameless plaza next to sinnergirl
Description: Some say it moves when no one´s looking. Others say it only reveals itself to those who truly need a wish granted. In any case, if you find it: Hang a wish, tie a secret, weave a promise into its bark. Maybe it grants them, maybe it eats them. Either way, your business is no longer your own.

Title: Hot sauna with icy fruits and popsicles!
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square G21.
Description: We will be serving icy stuff at random times. It’s up to the universe whether you get lucky or not.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 5 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Postnörd
Location: Bison - South, grid square O22. Corner on Sunset Plaza
Description: Send your(other)self a message in form of postcard from Borderland. Capture the fleeting moment and extract it out before it vanishes. Come hangout at Socialen, we offer a relaxed space to settle in a reflect for a moment and write yourself or others about your current state of mind.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Co-created time capsules
Location: The time capsules will be placed in an open space in 4 different neighborhoods for co-creation. Stumble upon them or take your desired future message or trinket and ask another Borderling of they have seen where to forward them to the future.
Vibes: 🐵 Kid-friendly · 😇 Sober · 🌈 Queer-inclusive · 🖤 Sex positive · 💥 Sensory content
Description: Time capsules: portals to the past, filled with memories for future generations. Seal photographs, letters or trinkets — 4 capsules, one per cardinal direction, co-created and sealed by different neighborhoods at the end of this year's Borderland. In 2027 they'll be buried under permanent art, for future archaeologists or extraterrestrials to wonder what strange not-a-cult walked this land.

Title: Leave No Trace Shower for Dirty Hippies
Location: Text or WhatsApp +45 51 90 31 49 for location
Description: Dust, sweat, glitter and forest. Bring water and enjoy a moment of warmth, care and renewal before returning to the adventure. Built with Leave No Trace principles, deep love., and a steadfast faith in my close to nonexistent technical skills.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July, Sat.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Jungle @TheBearsDen
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square H19. You'll find it where the bas is deepest!
Description: Come dance your feet off to some Jungle & DnB with BLs best soundsystem!

Title: House of SIN: Seven Sins Ceremony
Location: Bison - North, grid square N19. By the Shameless Plaza
Description: Enter the Seven Sins Ceremony - a playful and immersive journey into lust, curiosity, and connection. Through movement, gaze, touch, sound, ritual, and collective mischief, awaken your senses, embrace desire, and celebrate pleasure. Come and confess to transform and sin together.

Title: Kidsville Breakfast Club
Location: Lowlands, grid square P09. Follow the crumbs
Description: Kidsville serves breakfast: waffles, pancakes, Kaiserschmarrn and other delights. Bring your plate, spoon and smile
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 4 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: People watching
Location: Bison - North, grid square P22. We have a 10m dome
Description: Find a good spot anywhere and just sit back and people-watch while relaxing. It looks like a Borderland movie, doesn’t it?
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Coffee For All  + Live Radio Show
Location: Highlands, grid square L09.
Description: Coffee is ready. The gossip fresh. Bring your cup, take a seat, and tune in to our live radio show with music, juicy stories, last night’s questionable decisions, surprise guests, and whatever else unfolds. Sip. Sit. Listen. Say something.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 4 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Open Mat
Location: Highlands, grid square N11. The Pink Tantric Troll on the big workshop tent
Description:
Start the day on the mat with others through primal play, contact improvisation, Brazilian jiu-jitsu or a combination of the three.
There is no facilitator and no fixed structure, just a shared space to explore, connect and move together. Whoever arrives first kicks things off with a five-minute Tabata.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: The way of breath - breathwork introduction
Location: Highlands, grid square M09. From Penta Plaza you move north between 'The Heart' and 'Cheeky Butt Chill Camp'. The second last camp to your left ist 'The SeaLions Den' <3
Description: A deep breath is the first thing we do after birth and the last thing we do before dying. It is our steady companion and we dive into her world, to see what was unseen. How does it work and waht is happening to you and your body?

Title: Ecstatic Breathwork with Birger "Lokesh" and Cecilia
Location: Lowlands, grid square S12. Nearby Lowland Plaza
Description: Ecstatic Breathwork / Rebirthing: A guided breathing journey to release stress, tension, and suppressed emotions. Regulate your nervous system, deepen self-awareness, and open to more presence, pleasure, and transformation. No experience needed—just come as you are.

Title: Introduction to Improv Theatre
Facilitator/ Host camp: Gustaf, Per & Katinka / Room of Requirement
Location: Eastern Slope, grid square V19. Entry from the road
Description:
Improv theatre?! In the morning?! You are here now, come be here, now, wow! No experience needed. Outgoing or shy, sleepy or wide awake; just bring yourself, grab a cup of coffee and play with us!
Come for the coffee, stay for the drama.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Doggy Day Care at Camp Slothenhive
Location: Lowlands, grid square Q13. An enclosed area with dog toys and shade.
Description: If you want to leave your pooch for a few hours in a quiet campground to be watched by two volunteers, consider coming here.  It's hoped that people who leave their dogs also take a shift.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Meditation in the dome
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description: A place to meditate together in silence, and keep up your home practice, but in silent community. Do come along, first timers also welcome!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Pimp my Outfit
Location: Swamp, grid square S17. Look for the rune gate.
Description: Got an outfit that needs a little more sparkle? Bring your old clothes and transform them into something new, weird, wonderful or wildly unnecessary. Come pimp, bedazzle, patch, decorate and play — no skills needed, just curiosity and a desire to shine.

Title: Plotting the crime - Detectives' Stories
Location: Highlands, grid square N09. We will meet in our office in the dome, next to the street.
Description: Solve your first case in our academy. Then bring your own suspicious case – or really any – turn it into clues and puzzles, and file it away for future detectives to crack. You might be rewarded, if one chooses to see it that way.

Title: Baby Rave
Location: Lowlands, grid square P09.
Description: Baby Rave! Dance, jump around, crawl, have fun!

Title: Daily Jungian Dream matrix
Location: Swamp, grid square T18. @Feromonia, look for glamping  bell tent with black chimney
Description: Curious on Jungian philosophy and your unconscious? A dream matrix is a space where we share nightly dreams, in order to open up your unconscious and rediscover nightly dreams you'd forgotten. After the matrix there'll be a short teaching and sharing. See insta @BLdreammatrix
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Thrift happens
Facilitator/ Host camp: Kakan, Sickan and Akselito / Java the hut
Location: Highlands, grid square M09.
Description: Where one playa’s cast-offs become your festival glow-up. Curated rags, questionable choices, and impulsive entertainment included. Come dig through the treasures, leave looking fabulous.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: The Orgone Accumulator building workshop
Location: Bison - South, grid square P24. By the tree house in Bison
Description:
Come and build in our workshop area where we will construct orgone accumulators. We will provide the drawings, tools, material and guidance needed. The accumulators will be built in a proper Reichian way in order to accumulate orgone the most effective way possible.
Once the accumulators are built, we will gather Orgone at Borderland and invite participants to be soaked in it, showered with it, and possibly transformed by it.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Land into your capacity
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O07. Go to the plaza of the Arctic Chill. You will see signs and a big beautiful cozy beige canvas tent with fairy lights.
Description:
2 hours to connect with your true capacity and find what feels most true for you for this day and the festival. 
Max 20 people.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Vinyasa Launch: Activate & Align
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description:
Start your burn day with an energizing vinyasa flow designed to wake the body, charge the breath, and get your systems online. We’ll stretch, move, sweat a little, and reconnect — body to breath, feet to dust, heart to stars.
Come as you are. Bring a mat, water, and your favorite intergalactic leggings.

Title: Moving Connection
Location: Highlands, grid square M11.
Description: A guided exploration of non-verbal communication through movement, presence and emotional awareness. Less about technique, more about listening, relational intelligence and the subtle dance emerging between bodies.

Title: An exploration of the Liquid Body (with live instrumentation)
Facilitator/ Host camp: Joshua Carew & Lone Hav / The Observatory
Location: Swamp, grid square Q19.
Description: A contact improvisation/movement/somatic workshop led by Lone Hav and with live instrumentation by Joshua (William Florelle) where participants are invited to explore the theme of the ocean and evolution. From a singled celled organism to a many limbed being, how do we make sense of our bodies and the bodies around us at these varied stages of development. Vivid, poetic.

Title: Borderland Art Run
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square I21. Top of Sunny Hills!
Description:
Join this art run around the whole Borderland area and become the friend who says 'dude, you need to see this.' Bonus: you'll get the lay of the land, and the nature? Pretty banging too.
Social-pace jog (~6.30-7.00/km), ~4km on trail, grass and gravel. Swim after optional.

Title: Lunar Yoga - Kundalini Yoga for women
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O06. take the path on the right from pamper plaza, we are at the corner of the next turn
Description: Welcome to Lunar Yoga - a yoga session using the ancient Kundalini yoga technology applied for WOMEN! Bring your yoga mat and reconnect with yourself. Satnam, Aline
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Tantra for Beginners
Location: Highlands, grid square N11. Inside the main tent of the Tantric Trolls, High Lands, where the main roads meet.
Description: An introduction to what is actually tantra and how do you actually practice it.

Title: Daily Drop-In with the Conflict Resolution Team
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J20. Outside Clown Police HQ
Description:
Stuck in a conflict? Meet the CRT any day. We don’t take sides or decide for you. We’re here to listen, offer mediation tools, and help find ways to coexist. Stop by to chat, learn, or get support!

Conflicts should be solved between those involved, but if that isn’t possible, you can turn to us!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 7 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Circling/relatefulness/Surrendered Leadership
Facilitator/ Host camp: Depends on the day, see program board by SG / Secret Garden
Location: Downtown, grid square M21. Big white star shaped tent in the Secret Garden
Description:
One never has anything to do with another person without holding something of that person's life in ones hands.

If meditation is an art of being
Circling is an art of being-with

Come explore who you are in the meeting with others and the incredible richness of human connection in all its flavours.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Eco-systemic Reciprocity
Facilitator/ Host camp: Alex & Marco / The Bureau of Justice, Joy, Bubbles, and Other Dangerous Ideas
Location: Swamp, grid square S19. On the corner of Earth Plaza
Description: Join us for a session connecting to our inherently ecological nature. Taking time to slow down, connect to the living beings that we share this space with, and ground in practices to open up to a reciprocity and gratitude for this wonderfully interconnected, embodied and magical world.

Title: Ceremonial cacao for women
Facilitator/ Host camp: Aline and Cathrine / Women who supports women
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O06. In the white tippi
Description:
Come and take some breaths together with other women. 
Relax, just be and drink a calming cup of cacao with us. 
Remember to bring your own cup. 
See you.

Title: Finding Presence: An Ongoing Investigation
Facilitator/ Host camp: Lilly Ladybird / B.L.U.E Bureau of Logical Universal Enquiries
Location: Highlands, grid square N09. We are a big, metal dome structure with very serious detective furniture inside!
Description: You may have physically arrived at Borderland, but maybe lost some presence along the way? The Blue Detectives are looking for it. Come discover it together through grounding practices, breath, somatic movement and dance. Watch out for hidden presence along the way.

Title: (Temporarily) Tattoo your bod!
Location: Highlands, grid square N11. Penta Plaza, Highlands
Description:
Decorate yourself, your friends and maybe the person next to you with temporary, metallic tattoos! 

Get the face tattoo you always wanted! 

If tattoos are left-over at the end, we will make a small DIY station in our Beduin tent.

Title: Body work into massage
Location: Highlands, grid square M11. Big dome on the Penta Plaza.
Description:
Explore touch, embodied presence, & body awareness through guided partner bodywork exercises. Using relaxation, pressure, & movement. 
The workshop emphasises embodiment, active listening, and intuitive movement, in a consent aware container.  Bring towel, sarong & oil if interested in using oil.

Title: Vinyl jewellery
Location: Swamp, grid square S18. Huge Circus tent
Description: Lets create jewellery out of old vinyl records so you can wear your chosen track on your body the whole week!

Title: House of SIN: Black Gold Rites
Facilitator/ Host camp: Nils & Sigg from Jousting Jesters / Club SIN
Location: Bison - North, grid square N19. By the Shameless PlAZA
Description: Cleanse your tarnished palette with irresistible flavors, and join us in a dark tasting ritual; a rite of passage for anyone calling themselves a zealot of the true black gold. It will be sweet, it will be salty, it will be gluttonous, and it will be sacrilegious. Welcome, to the cult of liquorice!

Title: Body tempeh
Location: Swamp, grid square U16. Look for the croquet court!
Description: Come get your own little tempeh "egg" that you will incubate using your own body! We'll fit you with your own little pet that you need to keep close in order for it to mature into beautiful (and edible) tempeh. Come back Thursday at 19:00 and get it cooked (or cook it yourself).

Title: Calming pranayama with gentle touch
Location: Wedge, grid square R21. We're located in the Wedge neighbourhood, across the road from a swamp with a massive rock
Description: An exploration of breath and presence through gentle touch. In this workshop, we use simple breathing exercises and light touch to guide you toward a calmer, more grounded state of being. You can bring a partner or find one on the spot.

Title: Ask your father anything (or tell him to f*** o**!)
Location: We're not placed yet, call WhatsApp +45 51 90 31 49
Description: Ask Your Father Anything. Pull up a chair and have the conversation you never had. Ask for advice, comfort, approval, understanding, or answers. Rage, laugh, cry, or sit in silence. For a moment, You will be met, listened to and if you want, answered.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July, Sat.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Contact Improv & Live Music Jam
Location: Lowlands, grid square R13.
Description:
A Contact Improv jam gets a live soundtrack… and the soundtrack starts flirting back?
Dancers: come move, connect, counterbalance, and tune your body into the room and each other.
Musicians: come improvise, follow the dancers, tease the dancers, be led by the dancers, and occasionally narrate someone’s most tender floor duet with a suspiciously emotional tuba.
Beginners, experienced movers, musicians and curious witnesses all welcome!

Title: Dolce far niente
Location: Bison - North, grid square P22. Big 10m diameter dome
Description:
Master the magical art of doing nothing! No goals, no to-dos just you, a comfy
spot, and sweet, glorious idleness. Hug a tree, wiggle your toes, daydream
wildly. It’s fun, it’s freeing, it’s fabulously unproductive. Permission to laze:
granted!
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Live Talk Show - Deep talk
Location: Highlands, grid square L09.
Description: Nothing is off limits. Love, death, aliens, your ex, the meaning of life - grab a mic, ask a question, or just listen as strangers and new friends dive into the questions that matters the most.

Title: Authentic Relating (Introduction)
Location: Eastern Slope, grid square V19. Entry from the road
Description: Introduction to the 5 principles of authentic relating. The moving on with some circling and practicing connection

Title: Breakfast and speeddating
Facilitator/ Host camp: Captain Hook / Admiral Emmalsion / Secret Sailors
Location: Lowlands, grid square R12. Outside the tent of Secret Sailors, inside of raining.
Description: Join a breakfast for champions:  breakfast food will be served together with a side of sparks: new friends, maybe even a future partner and top shelf questions to ask each other.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: toast for a toast
Location: Lowlands, grid square Q13. next to sweetspot and spaceport
Description: Tell me who, in your eyes, deserves a toast. Is it your mom? The ants by the third tree on the left? Paris Hilton? Because you're thinking gratefully about other beings, you get a fresh, delicious piece of toast from me. :)
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Short Pranayama & Meditation
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description:
A quiet moment to arrive. Through traditional breathwork and meditation practices, we'll slow down, become present, and gently settle into ourselves before stepping into the day.

Open to all. Bring something comfortable to sit on, and let your breath do the rest.

Title: Toothpaste tasting
Location: Eastern Slope, grid square U21.
Description:
Make brushing your teeth a fun and absurd way of getting to know new people and new toothpastes! We take you to a trip around the world's most exquisite toothpastes. 
BYOT (Bring your own toothbrush -and pimp it at our craft booth!-) 
No toothbrush ? Pass by for a shot of mouthwash you stinky hippie ! 
Fun toothpastes ? Bring them all !
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 7 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Melt Into Her: Yin Yoga
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square J21. Follow the lesbian flag and the fairy lights to the water, the cluster of tents around the Pond with the bell tent at the heart.
Description: Melt into the soft hours with a slow, juicy yin yoga practice for femmes loving femmes (butches & nb folks included). Long-held poses, deep breath, gentle touch, come home to your body by the water. All levels, all bodies. Daily at 11, bring yourself, leave puddly 🐸
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 8 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Depression: sharing experiences and running together
Location: Highlands, grid square M09.
Description: This will be a workshop where we speak about depression, our experiences with it and I personally share my story of how i got better, which included running outdoors as a big factor. Therefore, after sharing and talking about it, everyone that wants can join for a short run together to maybe help in your healing jounrey as well. This is obviously optional but encouraged and the running will be done at a comfortable pace for everyone wanting to join!

Title: Wisdom of the circle  Sharing
Location: Lowlands, grid square S12. Near Lowland Plaza
Description: Before there were stages, there were circles. Join us in an ancient practice of listening, sharing and witnessing. Together we cultivate presence, trust and the quiet wisdom that only a circle can reveal.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 4 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: The biology of non-monogamy
Location: Highlands, grid square O10. in the big Tipi
Description: Lecture based on book "Sex at Dawn". 45min talk, then time for discussion. Topics include: (non)monogamy in perspective to human desires for touch and connection. Why are penises mushroom shaped? Why do we moan during sex? Why is our "sex to fertilisation" ratio so high? Come and find out :)

Title: The Jewellery Market
Location: This magical jewellery market will pop up at random times and at random places around the playa. If you’re supposed to, you’ll find it.
Description:
All jewellery: $Free.99
I bring jewellery from all over the world to this magical little pop-up! Come pick the piece(s) that speak to you and leave a kind word for the next person. Walk off with your new jewellery and a mystery note from the person before you.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: First Aid for Drug-related Emergencies
Location: Sanctuary, grid square K14. Meet in Front of the Sanctuary
Description: In this hands-on workshop we'll deal with the question "What to do if I encounter someone who's having a hard time due to drugs?". Especially if there's no sanctuary nearby. We'll cover some topics like "common drugs and their effect", "finding an unconscious person", "dealing with spiking", and "when to call 911". The goal ist to get you to take appropriate actions when your fellow hippy has overdosed.

Title: Kids Take the Stage!
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description:
Is your kid dreaming of being the star of the show? Now's their chance!

They'll step into the spotlight, push buttons, and drop beats live - while you cheer and dance like their biggest and proudest fan.

No experience needed, just curiosity and courage!

Tolerant non-parents are welcome too.

Title: Cranio sacral - grounding and integration
Facilitator/ Host camp: Sandrathebluebird / Glittertind in Trolltunga mini tent
Location: Bison - North, grid square O20. Trolltunga smaller tent
Description: Gentle Bodywork Session open for booking - see the cardboard sign. It involves touch or energetic touch, deep listening to the body, regulating the nervous system to homoestasis
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Silly, sweet sister is reading you fairy tales
Facilitator/ Host camp: Reida / Shimmering by the forest edge
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O06. In the Arctic Chill, close to Pamper Plaza, behind the camp "Women who supports women"
Description: Close your eyes, lay down, hug a stuffed animal and listen to fary tales told in swedish and english. It´s ok to fall asleep.

Title: S.experiment Cinema Ceremony
Location: mystery location, quench your thirst for more details/booking -> sara.bartosova@gmail.com
Description:
Secret porn star? Camera-phobic? Somewhere in between?
Come explore what alters when a camera quietly witnesses you. Bring yourself, a partner, a throuple, a fantasy, a costume, an aesthetic, a secret spot—or just curiosity. Together we'll play with presence, performance, and the strange magic that happens when someone presses record. All footage © will be yours, it can be deleted right after or become a sexy cinematic 4k edit to enjoy later.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 4 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Meditation for bros (of all genders)
Location: Arctic chill, grid square N05. In Arctic Chill, next to camps: Alajv, Love Nest, Brandenburners and The Coral Collective
Description: Have you ever wanted SWOLE muscles? Of course you have. But have you ever wanted a JACKED BRAIN?! This event is mostly for those who have limited experience with meditation, especially those who feel that meditation is not for them, because their mind wanders too much. Although everyone is welcome, even those who have an absolutely SHREDDED mind.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Sober Psychadelic Light Journey
Location: Highlands, grid square M13. Right next to Agrabah village. We have a beg centerpole, a green round military tent and a lot of lamps.
Description:
Light and sound become your portal to altered states. Close your eyes and let the lamp guide you into colorful visions, deep relaxation, and expanded awareness — no substances, just your own mind. Come open and curious.

Note: Not suitable if pregnant, under 18, with epilepsy, psychiatric/neurological conditions, photosensitive medication, or psychoactive substances in the last 24h.

Title: House of SIN: Playful Shibari
Location: Bison - North, grid square N19. By the Shameless PlAZA
Description: Playful and sensual rope workshop. Both for curious beginners and more experienced practitioners. We will help the person who is tied to let go of control. We do this by having solid good knots that don’t slip around and by having a playful and present vibe.

Title: Cosmic Cloud Café
Location: Bison - North, grid square O22. Bison - Next to Sunset Plaza
Description:
Enjoy chai, coffee, and cookies that taste like care, baked with love, served with presence and compassion. 
(There is a good chance that we will also serve coffee, etc outside our listed hours <3)
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 4 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Move like the animal you are
Location: Swamp, grid square S16. In The Swamp at Fire Plaza, a gallery and red carpet area opposite the large tent of CIRCUS the ANALOG.
Description: Before the gym, before the chair you moved like an animal. This workshop takes you back there. Crawl like an ape, leap like a frog, stalk like a cat. Get on the floor, stretch, crawl and play with fellow creatures. Connect to the intelligence living within you. Remember the fun to be on all fours.

Title: Record your whispers
Location: Eastern Slope, grid square V17. Foajé Villa Hutlös is a cozy camp with 8x5m main tent and a chill dome with hammocks. There will be a sign with the camp name.
Description:
Come by and record your stories, secrets, poems, dreams, jokes or anything else you'd like to share. The only rule is that you have to whisper.
Your recording will be played later in the week at the Whispering Forest, a sound installation placed deep in the woods.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: THE BORDERLAND BARBER RETURNS!!!
Location: Arctic chill, grid square P06.
Description:
The borderland barber returns for the third year in a row to pimp up some hippy hair. Come to me and I’ll get you feeling beautiful and refreshed! 

As I am a barber I will be mainly focussing on shorter haircuts but feel free to pop by and have a chat if you do have longer hair in need of a trim and I’ll see what I can do! 

All genders, hair types and people welcome!
Come see me and have your burner haircut sorted !
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July, Sat. 25 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Crowned creatures of the Borderland: Let’s make magic!
Facilitator/ Host camp: Gret and Aenni / House of Glöd
Location: Arctic chill, grid square P06.
Description: From deep-sea spirits to shimmering forest fairies, we’re dreaming of a Borderland filled with the most fabulous headpieces imaginable! Join our workshop and craft your very own magical creation.

Title: Raffi Listening Party featuring Sing Alongs and Dancing for Toddlers and Kiddos :)
Location: Lowlands, grid square P09. Kidsville Workshop Dome
Description: Join Bogsy the Magnificent as he shares his most favourite playlist of all the classic Raffi kids songs!! Who's Raffi? Come find out and maybe even sing along. Specifically great for Toddlers but everyone is welcome! :)

Title: Opening your throat - a beginner and advanced introduction to throat singing and guttural vocalization
Facilitator/ Host camp: Meow Meow and his Royal Darkness / Lucifer's Pit
Location: Downtown, grid square K19. Go in, dive deep!
Vibes: 🦍 Adults only · 🌈 Queer-inclusive · 🌈🌈 Queer-focused · 💥 Sensory content
Description: Throat singing has had a renaissance in recent years through different spiritual, shamanistic and metal bands. Come and join us at Lucifer’s Pit and learn some of the techniques where two passionate vocalizers will do their best to help you reach your first resonance point. Don’t be (too) scared!

Title: Hatha Yin Yoga
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description: Hatha and yin in one. Come back to your heart.

Title: TRANSCENDING BASS YOGA
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square H19.
Description: Welcome to Bass Yoga — a yoga class where deep bass frequencies are just as important as the poses. We move through simple, accessible asanas immersed in powerful bass-driven music you won't just hear — you'll feel it throughout your body. Let the vibrations guide your breath and connect you to the present. Seasoned yogi or complete beginner, come tune into the rhythm and discover a new way to flow.

Title: Draw me like one of your French girls
Location: Swamp, grid square R17.
Description:
Welcome to the best art class you will ever attend!

In this class we will start by (un)covering "Nude Drawing 101".
Class will then move on to the advanced course "Nude Drawing of people having sex 102".

No skills needed, just show up and get your artistic juices flowing!

Title: The Sultan's Court
Location: Highlands, grid square N13. Agrabah Village, in south eastern Highlands
Description: Do you have a life question, a dilemma, or a utterly ridiculous problem, that you wish to bring before the Sultan & their court? Bring your quaere - and your reverence - before the Sultan!👑

Title: Transformative breathwork: Love and Light
Location: Highlands, grid square M11. Look out for the flag with the big heart on it!
Description: Reclaim your true essence of love, light, and wholeness. Through intense circular breathing, we release what no longer serves us to remember a profound truth: everything you seek is already within you. Come breathe, let go, and return home to yourself.

Title: Leading with Heart & Presence
Location: Highlands, grid square M09.
Description: We talk and share about Leadership experience, how to step into these roles (inside & outside the burner community) and how it's rooted in being present - everyone welcome with or without experience

Title: father circle
Location: A circle for fathers to openly explore parenting, masculinity, family, and life. A warm, honest, non-judgmental space for sharing, listening, and connecting with other fathers.
Description: Join a circle for fathers to explore parenting, masculinity, family, and life in an open and supportive space. Through honest sharing and deep listening, we create connection, reflection, and community.

Title: Shamanic drum journey
Location: Swamp, grid square S17. The Swamp. In the epic camp of the wild sacred fire - the fire which burns days and nights
Description: Come for a grounding journey in space and time - with the aid of a steady drumbeat from one or several sami inspired shamanic drums. This event is suitable for experienced and non-experienced travellers. Bring only yourself and your intention!

Title: Pranic Heart Expansion (only women)
Location: Arctic chill, grid square O06. Look for Sinikka (Leia) at Women's Camp.
Description: A guided heart-expansion journey through breath, subtle energy and embodied presence. A space for release, softness and inner awakening. All levels welcome.

Title: Professor Paraphernalia
Location:
Swamp, grid square Q19. A curly haired lad in a black beanie roaming around, sometimes wearing a black T with "Professor Paraphernalia" printed on it.

Camped with Jousting Jesters, likely missing.
Description:
Roaming and ready to help with your drug-harm reduction questions, cigarette rolling assistance if you're too cooked, and equipped with bits and bobs which help people who choose to use drugs do so in a safer and more considered manner. He may be wearing a black T with "Professor Paraphernalia" printed on it, or not.

Approach and be helped! Or be referred to DanceSafe who are probably going to do a better job x
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 5 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July, Sat.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: The Bellybutton Fluff Donation Jar returns
Facilitator/ Host camp: Pernille & Babs / Alice the Malice in Wonderland
Location: Wedge, grid square R20.
Description: Got lint? Put your hairy bellybutton to work and donate that gloriously useless fluff to something even more useless. Stuff it in our Collection Jar and receive a Certificate of Donorship. Enough fluff = possible hamster sweater. Do your part for recycling. Multiple donations accepted.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 6 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Naked Vulnerability - Naked sharing circle about body shame
Location: Highlands, grid square N11. At Penta Plaza in Highlands
Description: Feeling ashamed about our bodies, being filled disgust, self- judgement and comparisons... These are very common experiences. And being on the playa with gorgeous people everywhere, it's easy to feel ugly and alone. This workshop aims to provide space to profoundly challenge this shame and confront your fears. In a safe, respectful and consent-aware space, take of your clothes in front of a crowd and talk honestly about how you feel about your body. Emotional support afterwards is available and confidentiality will be emphasised

Title: Bomba & Muffin Reggea Revolution (All rub n DUB)
Location: Sunny Hills, grid square I20.
Vibes: 🖤 Sex positive · 🚨 Triggering themes · 💥 Sensory content
Description:
HERB MOUNTAIN EXCLUSIVE!
Step into di riddim vortex as Raggamuffin and Bomboclaat blaze di decks! From dubby basslines to skanking madness, dem selectors make bundas whine, spirits fly, and time gets tipsy. Irie vibes only.

Title: Silversmith Cosmic Workshop
Location: Lowlands, grid square T13. There will be signs in the sky
Description: Create and design your own silver jewelry in a cosmic workshop. No experience needed, just curiosity and a touch of magic ✨

Title: Feathers in your hair
Location: Lowlands, grid square T13. In the Lowland area- a silversmith workshop will happen at the same place and time
Description: Come by any time in the designated time slot and make yourself or a friend a string of feathers to put in your hair. Feathers and tools provided. Good event for creativity and for meeting fellow borderlings.

Title: Make Your Borderland Dream Happen… Before It Actually Happens!!
Location: Arctic chill, grid square P07. The red hearttent, ofc
Description: What's your wildest BL longing? Meet the love of your life? Eye-gaze with a cat? Float on pink clouds? Come cheat Miss Reality: we circle up, you share a BL-wish, and we conjure it through roleplay & collective imagination. No acting skills — just curiosity. Not a nudity/sex-positive space; all desires welcome, fully clothed.

Title: Sigil & Tattoo
Location: Lowlands, grid square U13.
Description:
Sigil & Tattoo workshop
Join us in creating a personal sigil from a word, intention, or desire. Through a simple ritual of letters and shapes, language dissolves into symbol—a mark that belongs only to you.

Take your sigil home on paper, or choose to have it tattooed as a permanent reminder of this moment, this place, and whatever called you here.

Every mark tells a story.
Perhaps it’s time to write yours.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Mad Moroccan Tea-Party
Location: Highlands, grid square N12. If it looks like a Moroccan wonderland with a bunch of fairy lights, that should be us!
Description:
It’s always tea o’clock in Morocco, and it’s always tea-time in wonderland.
And so, if you subtract the two, it’s tea time at exactly 13:00-15:00 on Tuesday and Thursday at Alice in Morocco.
Come sit at the table for some strange stories, tricky riddles AND traditional Moroccan mint tea - there’s plenty of room, said Alice.
And remember, while you can never have less tea, you can always have more;)
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Life Force Activation
Facilitator/ Host camp: Dana, Linda och Elina / Camp Fire Energy
Location: Swamp, grid square U16. This camp is located behind Crocket Corner
Description: Life Force Activation. Activate your kundalini/orgasmic life force energy in this practice. A safe space for you to explore your true self and expand your consciousness.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: The Pretzel revealed
Location: Highlands, grid square M11. Big dome on the Penta Plaza.
Description: The Pretzel is here! Learn the legendary cuddle/hangout technique that lets two humans lean back comfortably while still facing each other — no chairs or props needed. We’ll even attempt the first-ever Infinite Pretzel. Bring a partner or meet one there. Fully clothed. Get ready to Pretzel!

Title: Meaning of Words
Location: Swamp, grid square S18. Huge Circus tent
Description: Some words are more powerful than others, some have a different frequency. Sometimes we say sorry where sorry is not actually needed. Come to share and talk about meanings behind words and how we experience them in our conversations.

Title: Kitty quest
Location: Wedge, grid square R21. We're located in the Wedge neighbourhood, across the road from a swamp with a massive rock
Description: Embark on a feline-inspired adventure across the playa, where every player embodies a good, a bad or a cudly cat through 15 different quirky, interactive, kitty missions. Explore hidden corners, charm strangers in playful mischief, cuddle on warm laps and get kitty treats when you succeed in completing your quest. Love cats? You will love these quests!

Title: Basics of House Dance
Location: Swamp, grid square T19. The LED dansbana (= pavilion)
Description: Discover the foundations of house dance in a fun, welcoming session open to everyone - no experience needed. We’ll explore the core grooves, rhythms, footwork, and freestyle elements that make house dance so expressive and joyful. Come move, connect with the music, and experience the energy and culture behind one of the world’s most vibrant street dance styles.

Title: Playful wheel of consent
Facilitator/ Host camp: Dunbear and Bunny Witch / End of the Rainbow
Location: Bison - North, grid square N20. go to the End of the Rainbow
Description: Who is it for, and what do you really want? A playful approach to the Wheel of Consent (Betty Martin), exploring Giving, Receiving, Taking and Allowing through animal archetypes. We move beyond basic consent exercises to embody how to ask for what you want and play with integrity. A fun introduction — come stretch those consent muscles as a warmup for steamy nights at Borderland!

Title: Techno & training in the monkeybar
Location: Highlands, grid square M11. Highlands, Penta plaza (big flag) next to Chilldome
Description:
Do you know the feeling of wanting to give up? Learn how to repress your feelings and keep on going in this highly paced workout where the social stigma of giving up is the main driver for continuing.
(All levels are welcome. It’ll be fun.)

Title: Body admiration  -croquis
Location: Swamp, grid square U17. Foajé Villa Hutlös has a wooden dome near the main tent. Event takes place either outside or inside the main tent.
Description:
Come and draw quick life model drawings in the spirit of love

Send gentle thoughts to the model while you draw. Admire different ways to be beautiful. Or come to pose as a model: nude, dressed or something in between, alone or as a couple. No need to know how to draw. Materials will be given on spot.

Title: Embodied touch
Location: grid square G10. The gate og of Alvheim in mumin valley
Description: A workshop about learning to touch another human being. We build deep safety first, then explore: listening with the whole body, sensing whether a body is open or closed, meeting it where it is. Softness, pressure, strength, stillness — whole body, not just hands. Inspired by contact improv, jujitsu, tantric touch & craniosacral therapy. 3 hours. Come as a couple, or be paired on the day.

Title: confess!
Location: Downtown, grid square K21. in the dark dungeons of the church
Description:
You have sinned. It's ok. Unburden yourself from this weight and dump it all on an anonymous stranger that will host you. The one place where you, in full confidentiality, can admit your worst, release its grip over you and learn to live free. 

Offer your sins and a white rabbit might appear.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 2 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Wonderland croquet
Location: Bison - North, grid square P22. Take the rabbit hole, down into the underworld and stay on the path until you hit bottom.
Description: Play wonderland croquet. Hit a ball through small gates where the rules may change when least expected. Flamingos may not be included. If you bring a stick, we have balls.

Title: Transformation Office
Location: Wedge, grid square R22. Teepee in piazza
Description: Ready for an appointment with your transformation? Transformation Office meets you with questions, not answers. Through conversation you receive a personal task — small, strange, a doorway to try something different. Hosted by Finnish wisdom curators. Coffee provided. Walk-ins welcome.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Tue. 21 July, Wed. 22 July, Thu. 23 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Make your own treasure box
Location: Arctic chill, grid square L05.
Description: In this drop-in workshop you can decorate a cute little box for yourself to store small things like jewellery, candy, or little toys.

Title: Festa Brasileira
Location: Lowlands, grid square P13. Lowlands, close to Spaceport
Description: Come shake it to Brazilian samba, strong coffee & caipirinhas made with love! Dr. Phil (Cafe Caminhos Abertos) brings classic percussion-heavy carnival vibes + live musicians. Bring instruments, colourful clothes & all the Portuguese you've got!

Title: The Tuesday Take-Off with Pink Parachute
Location: Lowlands, grid square P13.
Description: Fasten your seatbelts for Pinky’s Tuesday Take-Off 🛫. Festa Brasileira and Dr. Phil open with Brazilian samba, caipirinhas & coffee. Stick around for cocktails and our high-flying lineup to find your cruising altitude 💕🪂 Ken Kuusk, DAAS-WEDER, and Reelo serve: Italo, House, Breaks, and more.

Title: Circling/Relatefulness/Surrendered Leadership
Facilitator/ Host camp: Depends on the day, see program board by SG / Secret Garden
Location: Downtown, grid square M21. Big white star shaped tent in the Secret Garden
Description:
One never has anything to do with another person without holding something of that person's life in ones hands.

If meditation is an art of being
Circling is an art of being-with

Come explore who you are in the meeting with others and the incredible richness of human connection in all its flavours.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 5 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Thu. 23 July, Fri. 24 July, Sat.); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: Cunts Serving Crêpes
Location: Lowlands, grid square R11. Located in Low Lands close to Foxhole Camper Vans
Description: Follow the scent to the Low Lands, just south of Snack Plaza, where crispy delights, surprise twists, and loungey vibes await. We flip with flair, serve with love, and welcome all dusty dreamers. We're just a smell away.
Comments: Recurring: expanded to 3 days (Mon. 20 July, Tue. 21 July, Fri. 24 July); shown on: Tue. 21 July

Title: ⛓️Chainmail Workshop⛓️
Location: Far Flung Field, grid square X07. Far Flung Field, along the straight road, look for the big canvas bell tent! We might have a sign, but no promises.
Description:
Gather round, ye curious souls, for the noble art of chainmail awaits. We’ll weave ring through ring into something you can actually wear out on the Playa. Part craft, part witchcraft, and as equally addictive as it is fiddly.

No skill required, just bring thy fingers and a sense of adventure. I’ll teach thee the basic weave, and thou shalt wander off with a wee shiny treasure of thine own making, ready to catch the dust and the light.

Title: Intro to Non Violent Communication
Location: Lowlands, grid square P12. Dome by the tall pink temple, Lowlands
Description: Come learn and practice NVC with us!  NVC is a life-affirming way to connect with others and with yourself, useful in relationships of all kinds and even in the trickiest conflicts.  We'll try to start on time, right at 11.  Come as you are; no experience necessary.

Title: Psychedelics as a Dionysian Path
Location: Wedge, grid square R22.
Description: This lecture/conversation explores the potential and pitfalls of psychedelics as medicines, and the limitations of the medical model of mental health. I contrast the effects of psychedelics with traditional psychiatry and psychopharmacology, and argue that psychedelics both require and suggest a dramatically different orientation in what psychological healing is and how it comes to be.

Title: Sweat Lodge Ceremony
Location: Swamp, grid square S17.
Description: The lodge purifies what you're ready to release, teaches what you carry, and opens the door to the spirits. Four rounds of prayer in the hot, dark womb of the earth, thick with the smoke of sacred herbs. By fire and stone, by wind and steam.

Title: Workshop in blacksmithing
Location:
Swamp, grid square S17. next to the Fire Plaza, under a linenroof.
Contact for pre-booking: fanny.henriksson1@gmail.com
Vibes: 🦍 Adults only · 😇 Sober · 🌈 Queer-inclusive · 💥 Sensory content
Description:
Want to make a small ring or an artsy creation? This workshop will be a collaboration of your own imagination and the metal.
I will give a small introduction of blacksmithing, then guide you in the process. 
Iron, copper and brass will be available for you to turn into the art you fancy.
